noticias.resumen: RBC Capital  analyst Luca Issi   maintains argenx (NASDAQ:ARGX) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $890 to $945.

noticias.titulo: Chip Rout Drags Nasdaq 100 Lower, Oil Climbs: Stock Market Today
noticias.resumen: A deepening chipmaker slide pulls all major U.S. indexes lower Tuesday while oil climbs on a Strait of Hormuz strike and defensive sectors led the tape.

noticias.titulo: Strength Seen in CRINETICS PHARM (CRNX): Can Its 98.7% Jump Turn into More Strength?
noticias.resumen: CRINETICS PHARM (CRNX) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
